name: switch-demo
visual_summary: A button component with toggle functionality, ideal for selecting between two binary options within a mobile app. It is commonly used in settings or preferences screens to allow users to choose between two distinct states. The toggle state is typically represented by a switch that can be toggled on and off.
generation_prompt:
Create a production-ready button component with the following characteristics:

Name: switch-demo
Description: A button component with toggle functionality, ideal for selecting between two binary options within a mobile app. It is commonly used in settings or preferences screens to allow users to choose between two distinct states. The toggle state is typically represented by a switch that can be toggled on and off.
Style: e.g. dark, minimal
Interactions: e.g. animated, clickable
Tags: button, toggle, mobile

Requirements:
- Works in React with TypeScript by default but adaptable to Vue, Svelte, or plain HTML/CSS
- Uses Tailwind CSS for styling
- Fully accessible with ARIA labels and keyboard navigation
- Responsive and mobile-friendly
- No external dependencies beyond React and Tailwind unless necessary
- Include all necessary imports
- Export as default with sensible prop types

Generate clean production-ready code only. No explanations.
